nodes.label: Attempts to extract the first direct YouTube video URL.     Falls back to a dir
nodes.norm_label: attempts to extract the first direct youtube video url.     falls back to a dir

nodes.label: `Barbell Bench Press` -> `barbell-bench-press`.      Lowercase, every run of non
nodes.norm_label: `barbell bench press` -> `barbell-bench-press`.      lowercase, every run of non

nodes.label: Object path within the bucket. Lowercase uuid — object names are     case-sensit
nodes.norm_label: object path within the bucket. lowercase uuid — object names are     case-sensit

nodes.label: Anon-readable, CDN-cached, no auth header. Shape is fixed by Supabase     Storag
nodes.norm_label: anon-readable, cdn-cached, no auth header. shape is fixed by supabase     storag

nodes.label: Map canonical exercise slug -> (source file, alias or None).      Every anomaly
nodes.norm_label: map canonical exercise slug -> (source file, alias or none).      every anomaly

nodes.label: One `supabase storage cp` per image, for the owner to run once after the     buc
nodes.norm_label: one `supabase storage cp` per image, for the owner to run once after the     buc

nodes.label: `image_url` overrides the library JSON's `image_url` when this exercise     has
nodes.norm_label: `image_url` overrides the library json's `image_url` when this exercise     has

nodes.label: Single-quoted SQL literal. Doubling `'` is the only escape a standard     string
nodes.norm_label: single-quoted sql literal. doubling `'` is the only escape a standard     string

nodes.label: One transaction of upserts.      `part`/`parts` produce a chunk of a multi-file
nodes.norm_label: one transaction of upserts.      `part`/`parts` produce a chunk of a multi-file

nodes.label: `3/4 sit-up` -> `3/4 Sit-Up`. Capitalises across spaces, slashes,     hyphens an
nodes.norm_label: `3/4 sit-up` -> `3/4 sit-up`. capitalises across spaces, slashes,     hyphens an

nodes.label: Primary target first, then synergist, then secondaries — deduplicated     while
nodes.norm_label: primary target first, then synergist, then secondaries — deduplicated     while

nodes.label: The app's `type` vocabulary is Compound / Machine / Warm Up. Upstream     has no
nodes.norm_label: the app's `type` vocabulary is compound / machine / warm up. upstream     has no

nodes.label: What broke it
nodes.community_name: CI Build Failure — Root Cause & Fix

nodes.label: 1. `LogDayModel.swift` / `ResumeBanner.swift` shared the same UUID in `project.pbxproj`
nodes.community_name: CI Build Failure — Root Cause & Fix

nodes.label: 2. Xcode 15.4's compiler can't build `xctest-dynamic-overlay` (a transitive dependency)
